["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Armbian 是为 ARM 单板机提供的基于 Debian 和 Ubuntu 的操作系统。Armbian 仓库包括专用的 u-boot、内核及各种支持文件。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"可以使用以下方法更换软件源："}],"
",["$r","ul",null,{"children":["
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"armbian-config"}]," -> Personal -> Mirrors -> 选择镜像站。"]}],"
",["$r","li",null,{"children":["编辑 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/armbian.list"}],"，将 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"http://apt.armbian.com"}]," 替换为以下链接"]}],"
"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["然后执行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"apt update"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"这可以由以下命令完成"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("sed -i.bak 's#http://apt.armbian.com#");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("#g' /etc/apt/sources.list.d/armbian.list");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt update");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
